title: Code and Data for: Warming and Altered Nutrient Stoichiometry Drive Phytoplankton Miniaturization: A 20-Year Study in Bohai Bay, China
description: R scripts and input data files supporting the phytoplankton community analysis in Bohai Bay (2000-2020). Includes raw species-by-station abundance matrix (189 species x 303 stations), environmental time series, and analytical code for all figures and statistical models.
